title: Privilege Escalation: Sensitive Privileges Assigned to Non-Admin
description: Detects Event 4672 with dangerous privileges (SeDebugPrivilege, SeTcbPrivilege) assigned to non-SYSTEM accounts. Indicates token manipulation or privilege escalation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4672 and (PrivilegeList like '*SeDebugPrivilege*' or PrivilegeList like '*SeTcbPrivilege*' or PrivilegeList like '*SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege*' or PrivilegeList like '*SeLoadDriverPrivilege*')) and not (('Subject User Name' = 'SYSTEM' or 'Subject User Name' = '-')) and not ('Subject User Name' like '*$')) | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Domain = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectDomainName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Assignments, distinctcount(Entity) as Hosts by Account, Domain | sort -Assignments
falsepositives: Service accounts with legitimate elevated privileges
